summary: The macOS build job exited with code 1, but the provided context contains only the generic exit code message and a truncated hint without the actual failure details.

evidence.reason: Only concrete error message in the context, but it is a generic GitHub Actions wrapper message that indicates failure without revealing the underlying cause

evidence.quote: hint: to use in all of your new repositories, which will suppress th...
evidence.reason: A truncated warning message that appears Git-related but is incomplete and provides no actionable information

suggested_fix: Review the full CI job logs to see the actual test output, compilation errors, or other failure details that led to exit code 1

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-14 F2 fix. The Claude shim now persists _model_info from every API call; this row predates that emit so resolved_model and usage are not recoverable. requested_model is set to the shim-level alias (haiku for v1, sonnet for v2) which is what the post-fix shim emits.
